comment: pacifist-bot band for --sim 5000 --policy pacifist. RE-BASELINED in batch 11 (combat-balance MAJOR; human sign-off 2026-07-22/23). The blunt pacifist (talks its way through everything — no routing/awe/heal smarts) collapses in the now-hard game to 16/5000 = 0.3% (win_pct 0) — the dumb-mercy floor reference. kills_total 0 (pacifist_never_attacks still holds), spared_total 20531, deaths_combat 4978, deaths_dark 6, stuck 0. Band [0,4] catches a difficulty regression (dumb mercy suddenly winning several percent). Full final tuning values are documented in tests/tactical-band.json's comment. Prior baseline for the record: batch 7 measured 464/5000 (9.28%), band [5,20]. Re-baselining requires human sign-off (granted for this batch). Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
